title: Creamy Melted Wholesome Chickpeas Pilaf
description: This low-calorie-friendly meal prep dish combines a can of chickpeas with creamy ingredients for a wholesome and satisfying side dish.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste
1 small handful fresh parsley, finely chopped (optional)

instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened, about 2 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper. Cook for 30 seconds.
Drain chickpeas and add to the skillet with their cooking liquid.
Pour in vegetable broth and almond milk. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Bring to a simmer then reduce heat to low and let cook for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in lemon juice and parsley (if using). Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the mixture is thickened slightly.
Serve warm as a side dish or cool before refrigerating for meal prep.
